    Feeling Anxious? We Can Help.

    When anxiety starts to feel overwhelming, finding the right support can make all the difference. We offer a range of self care gifts, fidget rings, spa gift baskets and get well soon gifts for men to help ease your mind and bring a sense of calm back into your life. Whether you’re looking for gifts for people with anxiety or something to lift your own spirits, our thoughtfully curated selection is here to support i every step of the way.

    We believe that self-care isn’t selfish - it’s essential. Let us help i or someone i care about find a little more peace with our anxiety gifts, soothing gift sets for women, and thoughtful mental health gifts for people with anxiety. Because i deserve to feel your best, every day.

    In the Agoda

    Best Sellers

    Agoda Fidget Rings

    Spin your fidget ring, even if just for a few minutes, and restore a sense of calmness & peace.

    Fidget rings, also known as spinner rings, are stunning jewelry that give your body something to do and your mind something to be distracted by.

    Boutique Now

    Spa Gift Baskets

    Looking for the perfect self care gifts to show your love and support for someone struggling?

    Our self care gifts and wellness gift baskets offer therapeutic tools, soothing self care, and mental health relaxation techniques that help i feel calm, supported, loved, and comforted.

    Boutique Now

    Digital Workbooks

    Unlock your inner healing potential with our self-healing digital guides and printable planners.

    Self-healing guides come in various forms, each catering to different aspects of personal growth and well-being.

    Boutique Now

    Get 10% Off Your Order

    Join our mental health community and receive special deals, experts tips and exclusives right in your inbox.

    Men Deserve Some Self Care Gifts Too!

    Gift an elegant fidget ring for men, shop luxury gift baskets for men or create your own with our collection of get well soon gifts for men, all designed to help them feel relaxed and rejuvenated.
